goal: 从零构建多云 CLI 管理工具
_comment: CLI project — no UI, no Playwright. Concept-acceptance uses shell script E2E.

nodes.goal: 生成产品地图：命令树、配置模型、集成点
实现核心模块：多云认证（凭证安全存储）、集群管理、日志聚合（tail+搜索）、配置同步（含冲突解决）
nodes._modified_by: Step 3.5 — extended: credential secure storage (Ring 1, Config Closure), conflict resolution (Ring 1, Exception Closure)

nodes.goal: 实现插件系统：插件加载、安装、卸载、更新、列表
nodes._added_by: Step 3.5 — Ring 0 gap: 插件系统无实现节点
nodes._modified_by: Step 3.5 — extended: uninstall + update (Ring 1, Lifecycle Closure)

nodes.goal: 编译验证：go build + go vet + golangci-lint
CLI 冒烟测试：每个子命令执行 --help 和基本操作
对照产品概念验收 CLI 工具体验：每个核心功能的命令执行 + 输出验证
nodes._note: Dynamic verification uses shell script execution, not Playwright — CLI project has no UI
